untranslatable_reason: This signal requires option-specific indicators (time value premium, written call status, strike selection logic) that are not available in the equity price/technical indicator set. The core logic—detecting when time value has decayed to zero and rolling to a higher strike—requires option Greeks (theta, vega) and volatility surface data not present in allowed indicators. The signal is fundamentally an options management rule, not a price-action trading rule.
translation_notes: MCMILLAN_DRY_35 is an options management strategy for covered call rolling. It describes when to roll up a short call position rather than let stock be called away. Translating to pure equity technicals is not feasible without option chain data. A placeholder entry/exit using pivot points was provided but does not capture the true intent of the signal.
